ab: alra pakazalramay ta ziya kaninu.
ku ngadan mu maw i Uyang Pakaruku, muketrep lra ku ’ami harem.
en: My name is Uyang Pakaruku, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: i eman nanu ngadan?
ku ngadan mu i Uyang Pakaruku.
tu alrak u na iyan na mawan?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: tu alrak ku za Pinuyumayan.
a Yēncumin papiya nu rinuma’enan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ai, iniyam saruma’enan Pinuyumayan mi papiya.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是卑南族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Pinuyumayan.

ab: a Yēncumin papiya nu rinuma’enan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: melri, a Pinuyumayan i malri zi, a payrang i nani.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是卑南族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Pinuyumayan, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: ni eman alrak u?
tu alrak ku ni Masaw Mavaliw.
iziyua mu maw i temama? pidaya lra tu ’ami?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: makanemaen lra tu ’ami.
i iziyu mu maw i temama? pidaya lra tu ’ami?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: melri, i intaw mu maw na dawdawanan i kaniyam zekalr, makawalun lra tu ’ami.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pidaya lra tu ’ami ni vau na ma’inay?
muketrep misama’ za waluwaluwa lra tu ’ami ni valri na ma’inay.
tu ’ami ni vau mu ’ma’izang zazu kaninu?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: marama’izang kaninku za lruwatr ’ami i valri na ma’inay.
manueman nanu ikaaatras?
sakelawangan zi zuwa pasa ku ikaaatras.
sawariyan ku lra ’azi mena’u kaninu, alra mu atras u lra?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: ai, saleman misama’ za makatelun hamayan ku atrasan.
semever u lra maku?
’azi, pakumelri u.
varivariw u lra?
’azi, semever ku lra.
semever u lra?
ai, makatelun koking ku ika’alaluzun harem.
